name: nutrition-pp-mcp
description: One agent-native CLI over USDA FoodData Central and NutritionValue.org - with cross-source enrichment, protein-density comparison, nutrient ranking, and a local SQLite cache no other nutrition tool ships.

fdc_api_key.title: FDC_API_KEY
fdc_api_key.description: Sets FDC_API_KEY for the Nutrition (USDA FoodData Central + NutritionValue.org) MCP server.

usda_api_key.title: USDA_API_KEY
usda_api_key.description: Sets USDA_API_KEY for the Nutrition (USDA FoodData Central + NutritionValue.org) MCP server.
